tasks.subject: Task 1: Avatar dual-source schema + queries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** account_avatar keyed by (account_id, source) + per-row meta; account.avatar_source as the 4-state active pointer; source-aware sqlc queries; regen pkg/db. Leaves full go build red until T2/T3 (pkg/db green only) by design.

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/013_avatar_dual_source.sql","db/queries/account.sql","pkg/db"],"verifyCommand":"podman compose up -d && mise db:up && mise exec -- sqlc generate && go build ./pkg/db/","acceptanceCriteria":["013 applies; account_avatar PK (account_id,source)+bytes/content_type/etag; existing blobs migrate by avatar_source","sqlc generate ok; old single-blob query methods gone"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Avatar handlers + SourceURL (upload/selection/delete-fallback/?source GET)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** avatar.SourceURL; rework handle_avatar.go to dual-source: PUT upload->user+active, new PUT /me/avatar/selection, DELETE removes upload+fallback, GET serves active or ?source. Keep dbPool==nil seam + tx.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/avatar/avatar.go","pkg/avatar/avatar_test.go","pkg/server/handle_avatar.go","pkg/server/handle_avatar_test.go","pkg/server/server.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/avatar/ ./pkg/server/ -run Avatar -v && go build ./pkg/server/ ./pkg/avatar/","acceptanceCriteria":["SourceURL builds ?source=&v= URL","upload->user+active; selection switch/none/400 avatar_source_unavailable; delete-upload fallback; GET active or ?source"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Inherit-job rework (retain both, sticky active)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** runAvatarInherit upserts upstream source + activates only when avatar_source is NULL or already 'upstream' (never overrides none/user); etag-skip; remove old user-source guard. Full build green again.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go","pkg/federation/oidc/federation_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/ -run AvatarInherit -v && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -tags nodynamic ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["NULL active->store+activate upstream; user/none active->store only; upstream active->store+refresh; unchanged etag->no-op","full build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: /me reports avatarSource + per-source preview URLs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SessionView.avatarSource (active) + avatarSourceUrls (source->SourceURL) populated in sessionView via ListAvatarSourcesByAccount.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/contract/auth.go","pkg/server/handle_auth.go","pkg/server/handle_me_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run 'Me|Avatar' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["/me has avatarSource (omit when NULL) + avatarSourceUrls per existing row"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Frontend — avatar source picker
tasks.description:
**Goal:** EditProfileDialog picker (Inherited/Uploaded/None, active highlighted, selection PUT+reload, upload crop flow, remove-upload); SessionView TS fields; i18n.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/EditProfileDialog.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/EditProfileDialog.test.ts","dashboard/src/stores/auth.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/EditProfileDialog.test.ts && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["picker renders available sources + None, active highlighted; select->PUT selection+reload; upload+remove-upload work"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Frontend — IdP slug (list column + detail display)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Slug as its own list column (Name·Slug·Mode·State); read-only slug on the detail page.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpsView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpsView.test.ts","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.test.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdp && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["list has dedicated Slug column","detail shows read-only slug"]}
```

tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lift the disabled Switch into its own Status FormSection in IdP/OIDC/SAML detail views; save payload unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminOidcClientDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminSamlProviderDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["disabled toggle in its own titled section in all 3 detail views; save payload unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Frontend — ComboboxTokenInput + upstream scopes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reusable ComboboxTokenInput (suggestions w/ descriptions + custom + chips); wire into upstream IdP scopes (create+detail), replacing TagInput. OIDC app scopes unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/ComboboxTokenInput.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/ComboboxTokenInput.test.ts","dashboard/src/lib/scopes.ts","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpsView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/ComboboxTokenInput.test.ts src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdp && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["combobox: chips, suggestions+descriptions, custom add, remove; upstream scopes use it; scopes payload shape unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Frontend — accessibility sweep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** cursor-pointer on Button cva + all interactive primitives + disabled:cursor-not-allowed; aria-labels on icon-only buttons; focus-visible + semantics audit; Button-cursor regression test.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/ui/button/index.ts","dashboard/src/components/ui","dashboard/src/components/custom","dashboard/src/pages"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["Button cva has cursor-pointer; all interactive primitives show pointer; icon-only buttons aria-labelled; focus-visible+semantics fixed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Smoke update (dual-source) + done-gate + dist
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update avatar smoke to dual-source (coexist + selection switch + ?source); full gate; rebuild+commit dist.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/smoke/main.go","pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./... && cd dashboard && npm run test && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["smoke: upload+inherit coexist, switch upstream/user/none asserts active GET + ?source previews, SMOKE_EXIT=0","full gate green; dist rebuilt+committed"]}
```
